module.name: bigo
module.description: Algorithm complexity table — names with Big-O pills auto-coloured by growth class (constant→green … factorial→red). Body: "Name | O(...)" per section.
module.aiSpec:
An algorithm COMPLEXITY table — each row is an operation and its Big-O, shown as a pill auto-coloured by growth class (constant/log = good/green, quadratic+ = bad/red). Block module: split the body with `<!-- @ -->`, one row per section written `Name | O(...)`. The O(...) is rendered as math. Good for comparing data structures or algorithms.
<!-- @bigo --> Binary search | O(\log n) <!-- @ --> Bubble sort | O(n^2) <!-- @end -->

snippet.label: Big-O complexity table
snippet.text: <!-- @bigo label: Time --> Hash lookup | O(1) <!-- @ --> Binary search | O(\log n) <!-- @ --> Merge sort | O(n \log n) <!-- @ --> Bubble sort | O(n^2) <!-- @ --> Permutations | O(n!) <!-- @end -->
snippet.description: Rows of "Name | O(...)"; complexity pill auto-coloured by class.
